name: Sausalito Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a container with a tight-fitting lid.
2. Secure the lid tightly.
3. Shake well until all ingredients are fully combined.
4. Serve over any green salad.
5. Store leftover dressing in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 weeks.
6. Makes about 3 cups of dressing.
